title: Fix binder synchronization and typed evidence methods in campaign layer
consumer_purpose: Ensure lane.binder shadow field stays in sync with BinderService Ref, stop using generic addEvidence, centralize lane closure, and correctly return Binder from terminal processEvent.
claim_atoms: 1) processEvent terminal block captures Binder via ensureBinder not createBinder; 2) finalizeLaneClosure centralizes historian evidence+return+finalize+sync; 3) lane.binder shadow field synced at creation and finalization; 4) secretary uses typed evidence methods not generic addEvidence
